article.title: AI Agents Are Visiting News Sites More
article.author: Copperview Staff
article.content:
AI agents are increasingly visiting news websites. Several reports suggest that bot traffic is growing. Some publishers are exploring new payment models to monetize this traffic.

Key points:
- Agent traffic is growing (exact numbers vary by source)
- Some publishers are adding paywalls for bots
- Micropayments may be a solution

Sources: Various industry blogs and social media posts.
